el-infiltrado.description: A fun party game where friends try to find the infiltrator among the group. Perfect for gatherings — no app needed for players.
el-infiltrado.tagline: Can you find the infiltrator among your friends?
el-infiltrado.step1Desc: Add players, choose word categories and adjust options: number of infiltrators, rounds, discussion time and game mode.
el-infiltrado.step2Desc: Each player takes the phone privately and sees their secret word. Innocents see the same word. The infiltrator sees a different one — or nothing at all in hard mode.
el-infiltrado.step3Desc: One or more players are infiltrators: they don't know the real word. In hard mode they get no hint either — only their instincts to survive.
el-infiltrado.step4Desc: Everyone talks about the word without saying it directly. The infiltrator tries to blend in using context clues from others.
el-infiltrado.step5Desc: When discussion ends, everyone votes for who they think is the infiltrator. The majority decides who gets eliminated.
el-infiltrado.step6Desc: The truth is revealed — was the eliminated player innocent or the infiltrator? Play continues until all infiltrators are found or they survive.
el-infiltrado.modeClassicDesc: The infiltrator gets a hint word similar to the real one. Ideal for balanced games.
el-infiltrado.modeHardDesc: The infiltrator gets no hint at all. Only instinct and acting skills to survive.
el-infiltrado.modeChaosDesc: The number of infiltrators is random — nobody knows how many. Total distrust.
el-infiltrado.tip: Be vague but convincing. Too much detail gives you away, but so does too much hesitation.

tvMode.title: El Infiltrado — TV Mode
tvMode.notFound: Room not found. Check the code.
tvMode.occupiedHint: Another TV is already connected to this room. Disconnect it first.
tvMode.revealWaiting: Waiting for everyone to see their role…
tvMode.voteAnytime: You can call a vote at any time
tvMode.discussionInstruction: Say a phrase or clue related to your word, without revealing it
discussionPhrases: Who seems most suspicious to you?
The infiltrator already chose who to blame.
Are you sure about what you saw?
The clues are already on the table.
Time to vote for the suspect.
tvMode.votingDesc: Players are deciding who the infiltrator is
suspicionPhrases: The infiltrator could be this one.
Why did they change the subject?
Got nervous at exactly the right moment.
Reacted before the question was even asked.
Defended their story a little too hard.
Something in their eyes doesn't add up.
Why do they know so much?
Their body language gives them away.
Who else would vote for this one?
The infiltrator always smiles like that.
tvMode.remainingInfiltrators: {count, plural, one {# infiltrator remaining} other {# infiltrators remaining}}
waitPhrases: Do you trust everyone in your group?
The infiltrator already knows who you are.
Speak carefully. Someone is studying you.
The best actors win without saying a word.
A false clue can ruin you.
What if you're the infiltrator?
Watch reactions, not words.
Silence is also a tell.
Nobody confesses… until they lose.
In this game, everyone lies a little.
The right word can save you.
How many have slipped up already?
The infiltrator listens more than they speak.
A well-timed smile can deflect suspicion.
Who's keeping track of the mistakes?
Don't trust the one who's always right.
The loudest accuser usually has something to hide.
How many more rounds can you survive?
Remember your word. Don't mix it up.
The infiltrator has already chosen their next target.
Is everyone talking about the same thing?
One vocabulary slip can cost you everything.
Nobody is as innocent as they seem.
A group that doesn't trust each other loses.
Are you sure about what you just said?
The infiltrator learns from every round.
Stay calm. Or at least pretend to.
Did anyone hesitate a little too long before answering?
The best lies sound exactly like the truth.
This game ends when someone makes a mistake.

word-rush.description: A fast-paced word game that tests your vocabulary and reflexes. Play solo or challenge your friends in real time.

cube-quest.description: A satisfying puzzle game where you stack, balance and explode cubes through increasingly creative levels.

about.label: Our studio
about.title: We build apps that bring people together
about.body: We are an independent mobile app studio passionate about creating unique experiences. Every product we develop is designed to generate fun moments — whether at gatherings, on trips, or just at home.
about.v1modalBody: We design every experience to generate laughs and great moments. We believe the best apps are the ones that make people want to come back again and again.
about.v2modalBody: From the very first use, anyone can join without reading a manual. Simplicity is a design decision, not a limitation.
about.v3modalBody: Our apps come alive when used with others. Every mechanic is designed to spark conversations, tension, and memorable group moments.

bento.title: Everything you need for the perfect game night.
bento.subtitle: El Infiltrado is designed for everyone to have fun, no hassle.
bento.c1title: Can you find the infiltrator among your friends?
bento.c2desc: Only the host needs the app. Everyone else plays from the main screen.
bento.c3desc: Random roles and new words make sure no two games are ever the same.

testimonials.label: Reviews
testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of rounds played around the world.
testimonials.r1: El Infiltrado became the go-to game at every family gathering. Everyone wants to play!
testimonials.r2: Super easy to understand and really fun. We downloaded it for a game night and ended up playing until 3am.
testimonials.r3: I love that not everyone needs the game installed. Perfect for any gathering.
testimonials.r4: The infiltrator dynamic is brilliant. Every round is different and always full of tension.
testimonials.r5: Simple, addictive and very funny. Exactly what I was looking for to play with friends.
testimonials.r6: Perfect for breaking the ice at gatherings where people don't know each other well.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our apps.
faq.q1: Where can I download the apps?
faq.a1: Our apps are available on Google Play for Android devices.
faq.a2: Yes, all our apps are free to download. Some include optional in-app purchases.
faq.a3: Our apps are compatible with Android devices. iOS support is coming soon.
faq.q4: Will there be more apps coming soon?
faq.a4: Yes! We are actively developing new titles. Follow us on social media to stay updated on upcoming releases.
faq.q5: How can I contact the team?
faq.a5: You can reach us through the contact forms on each app page, or send us a message on our social media channels.
faq.q6: How many players does El Infiltrado need?
faq.a6: The game works best with 4 to 12 players, though it can be played with 3. Only the host needs the app installed.
faq.q7: How do I cancel my premium subscription?
faq.a7: Subscriptions are managed through Google Play. Go to your Google Play account → Subscriptions and cancel from there.
faq.q8: Where do I report a bug or issue?
faq.a8: Email us at dahoreddiegohernandez@gmail.com with a description of the issue and your device. We respond within 48 hours.
